claim_title: Median age and dependency ratio functions are duplicated

results.description: Count occurrences of median/dependency function definitions across cited modules.
results.command: median=$(rg -n "def (_?calculate_median_age)" cohort_projections/utils/demographic_utils.py cohort_projections/core/cohort_component.py cohort_projections/output/reports.py | wc -l); dependency=$(rg -n "def (_?calculate_dependency_ratio)" cohort_projections/utils/demographic_utils.py cohort_projections/core/cohort_component.py cohort_projections/output/reports.py | wc -l); echo "MEDIAN_DEF_COUNT=$median"; echo "DEPENDENCY_DEF_COUNT=$dependency"; if [ "$median" -ge 3 ] && [ "$dependency" -ge 2 ]; then echo "ASSERTION=PASS"; else echo "ASSERTION=FAIL"; exit 1; fi
failure_reasons: stdout does not match regex: MEDIAN_DEF_COUNT=[3-9]
stdout does not match regex: DEPENDENCY_DEF_COUNT=[2-9]
